mapper.sql: order_id, shop_id, user_id, shop_name, total, status, all_count, pay_time, cancel_time, is_payed, close_type, order_addr_id, create_time
mapper.select: select from `order` where order_id = #{orderId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into `order` (shop_id, user_id, shop_name, total, status, all_count, is_payed, order_addr_id) values (#{shopId}, #{userId}, #{shopName}, #{total}, #{status}, #{allCount}, #{isPayed}, #{orderAddrId})
mapper.update: update `order` set status = 2, is_payed = 1, pay_time = #{payTime} where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 1
update `order` set status = 6, close_type = #{closeType}, cancel_time = #{cancelTime} where order_id = #{orderId} and status = 1
mapper.select: select order_id from `order` where status = 1 and create_time < #{expireBefore}
